'''鈭歴h-th-j''' ('''shathaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecstasize|ecstasize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecstasize|ecstasize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-th-j
|-
! Lemma
| shathaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathajithi|shathajithi]] || [[word:shathajiji|shathajiji]] || [[word:shathajishi|shathajishi]] || [[word:shathaji|shathaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathajuthuth|shathajuthuth]] || [[word:shathajujuj|shathajujuj]] || [[word:shathajushush|shathajushush]] || [[word:shathaj|shathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathajuthu|shathajuthu]] || [[word:shathajuju|shathajuju]] || [[word:shathajushu|shathajushu]] || [[word:shathaju|shathaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathajufuth|shathajufuth]] || [[word:shathajufuj|shathajufuj]] || [[word:shathajufush|shathajufush]] || [[word:shathajuf|shathajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathajethe|shathajethe]] || [[word:shathajeje|shathajeje]] || [[word:shathajeshe|shathajeshe]] || [[word:shathaje|shathaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathajothoth|shathajothoth]] || [[word:shathajojoj|shathajojoj]] || [[word:shathajoshosh|shathajoshosh]] || [[word:shathaj|shathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathajotho|shathajotho]] || [[word:shathajojo|shathajojo]] || [[word:shathajosho|shathajosho]] || [[word:shathajo|shathajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathajofoth|shathajofoth]] || [[word:shathajofoj|shathajofoj]] || [[word:shathajofosh|shathajofosh]] || [[word:shathajof|shathajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathaj忙th忙|shathaj忙th忙]] || [[word:shathaj忙j忙|shathaj忙j忙]] || [[word:shathaj忙sh忙|shathaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:shathaj忙|shathaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathajathath|shathajathath]] || [[word:shathajajaj|shathajajaj]] || [[word:shathajashash|shathajashash]] || [[word:shathaj|shathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathajatha|shathajatha]] || [[word:shathajaja|shathajaja]] || [[word:shathajasha|shathajasha]] || [[word:shathaja|shathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathajafath|shathajafath]] || [[word:shathajafaj|shathajafaj]] || [[word:shathajafash|shathajafash]] || [[word:shathajaf|shathajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shathajasha|shathajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathajasha|goshathajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathajasha|gokishathajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shathajn眉sha|shathajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathajnkn眉sha|goshathajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajn眉sha|gokishathajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathajsh毛sha|shathajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathajnksh毛sha|goshathajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathajsh毛sha|gokishathajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajrosha|shathajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajnkrosha|goshathajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajrosha|gokishathajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajmusha|shathajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajnkmusha|goshathajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajmusha|gokishathajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathajsherasha|shathajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathajnksherasha|goshathajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathajsherasha|gokishathajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathajngasha|shathajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathajnkngasha|goshathajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathajngasha|gokishathajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathajyasha|shathajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathajnkyasha|goshathajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathajyasha|gokishathajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathajyamasha|shathajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathajnkyamasha|goshathajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathajyamasha|gokishathajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathajn眉sh毛sha|shathajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathajnkn眉sh毛sha|goshathajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathajn眉sh毛sha|gokishathajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajn眉rosha|shathajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajnkn眉rosha|goshathajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajn眉rosha|gokishathajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajn眉musha|shathajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajnkn眉musha|goshathajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajn眉musha|gokishathajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathajsh毛n眉sha|shathajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathajnksh毛n眉sha|goshathajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajsh毛n眉sha|gokishathajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajsh毛rosha|shathajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajnksh毛rosha|goshathajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajsh毛rosha|gokishathajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajsh毛musha|shathajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajnksh毛musha|goshathajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajsh毛musha|gokishathajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathajron眉sha|shathajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathajnkron眉sha|goshathajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajron眉sha|gokishathajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathajrosh毛sha|shathajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathajnkrosh毛sha|goshathajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathajrosh毛sha|gokishathajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathajromusha|shathajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathajnkromusha|goshathajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathajromusha|gokishathajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathajmun眉sha|shathajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathajnkmun眉sha|goshathajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathajmun眉sha|gokishathajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathajmush毛sha|shathajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathajnkmush毛sha|goshathajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathajmush毛sha|gokishathajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathajmurosha|shathajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathajnkmurosha|goshathajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathajmurosha|gokishathajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shathaj|shathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙th忙j|sh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshathaj|hoshathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙th忙j|hosh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshathaj|hohoshathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙th忙j|hohosh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shathaj|n眉shathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙th忙j|n眉sh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shathaj|n眉n眉shathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙th忙j|n眉n眉sh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shathaj|n茂shathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙th忙j|n茂sh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shathaj|n茂n茂shathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙th忙j|n茂n茂sh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushathaj|lushathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙th忙j|lush忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushathaj|lulushathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙th忙j|lulush忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishathaj|lishathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙th忙j|lish忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishathaj|lilishathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙th忙j|lilish忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshathaj|koshathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙th忙j|kosh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshathaj|kokoshathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙th忙j|kokosh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshathaj|keshathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙th忙j|kesh忙th忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshathaj|kekeshathaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙th忙j|kekesh忙th忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
